problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: If Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
